planningConfig.description: Configuration for Horizon Books Planning in Fabric IQ models — budget targets, scenario modeling, plan-vs-actual variance, and writeback-ready planning tables.

models.name: RevenueTargets
models.description: Channel-level revenue targets for FY2026–FY2027 with base/optimistic/conservative scenarios. Grounded on forecast data from ForecastSalesRevenue.

models.name: FinancialPlan
models.description: P&L account-level financial plan with budget allocations, forecast alignment, and scenario modeling. Bridges FactBudget and ForecastFinancial.

models.name: WorkforcePlan
models.description: Headcount and payroll targets by department with hiring scenario modeling. Bridges FactPayroll actuals and ForecastWorkforce projections.

models.name: PlanVsActual
models.description: Consolidated plan-vs-actual variance analysis across Finance, Revenue, and Workforce domains with status flags and drill-down dimensions.

models.name: ScenarioComparison
models.description: Side-by-side scenario comparison table for executive dashboards — aggregates all domain targets by scenario, quarter, and fiscal year.
